basic_details.short_information: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) Paediatrician, Full Time Medical Officer, Full Time Medical Officer (Maternity Home), and Part Time Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the CSMC Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: CSMC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSMC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) recruitment is scheduled for 02 July 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific reporting times.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies announced by the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) for various medical posts, including Paediatrician, Full Time Medical Officer, and Part Time Medical Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-, and for SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 250/-. This fee is applicable for the walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the CSMC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) is 70 years. There is no mention of age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the CSMC medical officer posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post. For Paediatrician, it's MBBS MD Paed/MBBS DCH/MBBS DNB. For Medical Officers (Full Time and Part Time), it's MBBS with MMC Registration. For Full Time Medical Officer (Maternity Home), it's MBBS+DGO.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month. Paediatricians can earn up to Rs. 75,000/-, while Medical Officers can earn Rs. 60,000/- (Full Time) and Rs. 30,000/- (Part Time).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification, and finally the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the CSMC walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job offered by the Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar Municipal Corporation (CSMC) for these posts is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CSMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. Candidates are strongly advised to download and review it thoroughly before attending the walk-in interview.
